subject: [PATCH 3/3] nfsd: recall deleg if a requested dir attr change can't be encoded

2026-06-17.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the NFSv4 server where it silently drops directory attribute change notifications if they cannot be encoded. The patch recalls the delegation when such a notification is requested but cannot be delivered, as required by RFC 8881. It achieves this by treating a failure to encode the dir attribute change like other per-event encode failures and falling through to recall the delegation.
